mapper.select: select id,title,category,summary,content,status from health_articles where status='PUBLISHED' order by id desc
select id,title,category,summary,content,status from health_articles order by id desc
select id,title,category,summary,content,status from health_articles where id=#{id}
mapper.update: update health_articles set title=#{title}, category=#{category}, summary=#{summary}, content=#{content}, status=#{status} where id=#{id}
update health_articles set status=#{status} where id=#{id}
